title: Ordivon Event Taxonomy
description: Canonical event types and classes for the Ordivon event governance system. Every governance input is treated as an event before it becomes a governed state transition.

E0_observation.description: Passive observation event. Agent or system reads state without modifying it.

E1_documentation.description: Documentation artifact creation or update. New governance document, note, or reference material.

E2_governance_artifact.description: Governance artifact event. Registry entry, receipt, phase boundary, wiki, or routing surface changed.

E3_evidence.description: Evidence capture event. Command output, test result, validation result recorded.

E4_debt_lifecycle.description: Debt lifecycle event. Debt opened, renewed, escalated, downgraded, or closed.

E5_checker_gate.description: Checker or gate event. Checker rule added, modified, or removed. Gate policy changed.

E6_authority_policy.description: Authority or policy event. CandidateRule proposed, policy reviewed, authority scope changed.

E7_promotion.description: Promotion or maturity event. Governance subsystem maturity class changed.

E8_runtime_tool.description: Runtime tool invocation event. Agent invokes an external tool or executes a side-effect action.

E9_external_impact.description: External or public impact event. Release, deployment, public communication, external system write.

artifact_submitted.description: A new governance document or artifact is submitted

artifact_modified.description: An existing governance document or artifact is modified

registry_entry_created.description: A new entry is added to the document registry

registry_entry_modified.description: An existing registry entry is modified

receipt_written.description: A stage closure receipt is produced

receipt_claim_updated.description: A claim within a receipt is updated

phase_boundary_updated.description: Current phase boundaries document is modified

wiki_regenerated.description: Wiki index is regenerated from registry

evidence_collected.description: Command outputs are captured with SHA256 hashes

claim_replayed.description: A receipt claim is replayed and verified against current state

test_suite_run.description: A test suite is executed and results recorded

debt_opened.description: A new debt entry is created

debt_renewed.description: An existing debt has its due_stage or expiry updated

debt_closed.description: A debt is closed with resolution evidence

debt_severity_changed.description: A debt's severity is upgraded or downgraded

checker_registered.description: A new checker is registered in the checker ecosystem

checker_rule_modified.description: An existing checker rule is refined

gate_severity_changed.description: A gate severity is changed (e.g. DEGRADED→BLOCKING)

candidate_rule_proposed.description: A CandidateRule is drafted from a lesson

candidate_rule_evaluated.description: A CandidateRule is evaluated in shadow mode

policy_activated.description: A CandidateRule is activated as Policy after review

authority_scope_changed.description: The authority scope of a governance object is changed

promotion_requested.description: A promotion to a higher maturity class is requested

promotion_granted.description: A promotion is granted by governance owner

deferred_gap_accepted.description: A deferred gap is formally accepted with review trigger

tool_invoked.description: An agent or system invokes an external tool

file_modified_by_tool.description: A tool or script modifies repo files

external_api_called.description: An external API is called with side effects

external_deployment.description: Code or configuration is deployed externally

compliance_submission.description: A compliance or regulatory submission is made

finding_recorded.description: A finding is recorded in a finding ledger

lesson_extracted.description: A lesson is extracted from resolved debt or finding

inventory_executed.description: An inventory scan discovers governance artifacts

verify_executed.description: Governance verify is executed and results recorded
